athlete.metaDescription: Access your athlete portal — registrations, results, and events.
athlete.subtitleIdentify: Enter your email to sign in or create your athlete account.
athlete.subtitleEmailOnly: Enter your email to continue with password or social sign-in.
athlete.subtitleRegister: Looks like you're new. Tell us your name to create your athlete profile.
athlete.subtitleRegisterPassword: Create your profile with a strong password to protect your account.
athlete.brandSub: Registrations, results, QR codes, and upcoming events. Everything an athlete needs in one place.
athlete.brandFooter: Your data is protected. We never share your information.
athlete.testimonial1Quote: Registering took less than a minute. My QR was ready instantly and I skipped the lines.
athlete.testimonial2Quote: Finally a platform that gets runners: results, registrations, and your Triboo in one place.
athlete.testimonial3Quote: Every race is a new chapter. Athlete Hub helps me never miss one.
athlete.otpError: We couldn't send the code. Please try again.
athlete.dobHint: We use this to recommend the right category for each event.
athlete.dobInvalid: Enter a valid date of birth
athlete.genderHint: Optional — required only for categories with gender restrictions.
athlete.socialOnlySubtitle: {{email}} is linked to social sign-in. Continue with your provider below, or set a password by email.
athlete.oauthAccountPickerHint: You'll be asked to choose which account to use.

password.label: Password
password.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a secure reset link.
password.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for that email, we sent a 6-digit reset code.
password.resetSubtitle: Use a strong password you don't use anywhere else.
password.resetSubtitleCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your email and choose a new password.
password.resetInvalid: This reset link is invalid or expired. Request a new one from sign in.

auth.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in {{seconds}} seconds.

staff.metaDescription: Access for Athlete Hub administrators and organizers.
staff.subtitleUnified: Enter your work email — we'll detect your role automatically.
staff.brandSub: Registrations, payments, categories, and real-time metrics. The hub your organization needs.
staff.testimonial1Quote: We went from spreadsheets to a real ops hub. Registrations and payments just flow.
staff.testimonial2Quote: The panel gives us full visibility: categories, capacity, revenue — all in real time.

sso.completingHint: This usually takes just a few seconds.
sso.doNotRefresh: Please don't close or refresh this page. We're securely finishing your sign-in.
sso.failed: We couldn't complete social sign-in. Try email or another provider.

quotes.1: Every kilometer you train is a deposit in your next finish line.
quotes.2: The race doesn't start at the gun — it starts when you show up.
quotes.3: Your Triboo is waiting. One more step and you're on the start list.
quotes.4: Champions are built in the quiet miles nobody sees.
quotes.5: Today you're not just signing in — you're claiming your next challenge.
quotes.6: Strong legs, steady mind. Your portal is almost ready.

staffManagement.title: Staff

staffManagement.searchOrganizers: Search organizers by name, email, or slug…

staffManagement.createOrganizerSubtitle: Set up a new event organizer and assign an owner. A welcome email will be sent to the owner automatically.
staffManagement.createOrganizerEventsSubtitle: Organizer staff will only manage events linked to this organization.
staffManagement.slugHelp: A slug is a short, URL-friendly ID for this organization (letters, numbers, and hyphens only). It appears on public event pages and links so athletes can identify who is hosting. Each slug must be unique across the platform.
staffManagement.slugAutoHint: Slug updates automatically from the organization name until you edit it.
staffManagement.organizerDetailSubtitle: Team members, status, and event footprint
staffManagement.addAdminSubtitle: Create an admin account. A welcome email with sign-in instructions will be sent automatically.
staffManagement.superAdminOnly: Only super admins can add or modify platform administrators.
staffManagement.linkEventsSubtitle: Staff who log in for this organization can only manage events linked here.
staffManagement.noLinkableEvents: No other events available to link.
staffManagement.noLinkedEvents: No events linked yet. Link events so this organization can manage them.

adminCreate.title: Create event

adminCreate.searchOrganizer: Search organizers by name or email…
adminCreate.pickOrganizerHint: Select an organizer to preview branding
adminCreate.requiresWaiverHint: When enabled, athletes must accept waivers before registering. You can configure waivers after creating the draft.

sponsorAnalytics.title: Sponsor analytics
sponsorAnalytics.subtitle: Impressions and clicks from the public event page carousel

eventEdit.subtitle: Configure details, categories, and sponsors before publishing
eventEdit.detailsHelp: Core event info shown on the public page. Set venue coordinates so the course map and event location stay in sync.
eventEdit.fieldLocationHint: Venue coordinates — used on the public map and as the default route start. You can also set them from the Course tab.
eventEdit.fieldHeroHint: Or paste an image URL below. Larger files are resized on upload.
eventEdit.fieldBannerHint: Wide 21:9 image for the event detail hero and social previews. Falls back to the hero if empty.
eventEdit.sponsorsHelp: Upload sponsor logos (PNG/JPG) or paste URLs. Logos upload to CDN when you save sponsors.

imageCrop.title: Crop & preview image
imageCrop.description: Adjust the crop and check how this image will look across Triboo Sport before saving.
imageCrop.uploadHint: Choose a file to crop and preview placements across the site. Upload happens when you save.
imageCrop.recropFailed: Could not load this image for re-cropping. Upload a new file instead.
imageCrop.prepareFailed: Could not prepare this image for cropping. Try JPEG or PNG, or export again from your phone.
imageCrop.applyFailed: Could not apply the crop. Try again or choose a different image.

roleHint.hero: Hero images power marketplace cards, home featured events, search, and compact list layouts. Prefer keeping key subjects centered.
roleHint.banner: Banner images fill the event detail hero and social previews. Use a wide crop with title-safe space at the bottom.
roleHint.sponsor: Sponsor logos render on dark backgrounds with inverted styling. Prefer transparent PNGs and keep logos centered.
roleHint.gallery: Gallery images appear in the media grid and may also surface on cards. Avoid tiny text near the edges.

imageRecommended.hero: Recommended: {{width}}×{{height}} px ({{ratio}}). Best for event cards, home, and search.
imageRecommended.banner: Recommended: {{width}}×{{height}} px ({{ratio}}). Best for the event detail hero and social previews.
imageRecommended.sponsor: Recommended: {{width}}×{{height}} px ({{ratio}}). PNG with transparent background works best.
imageRecommended.gallery: Recommended: {{width}}×{{height}} px ({{ratio}}). Used in the event media gallery.

eventEdit.assetUploadOnSave: File uploads when you save this section.

assetHint.image: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC — max 8MB

assetValidation.imageType: Use JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC

preview.title: Preview before publish
preview.description: Review how athletes will see your event listing.
preview.payoutBlocked: Payout setup must be complete before publishing paid categories.

eventEdit.pendingApprovalBannerOrganizer: This event is waiting for platform admin approval. You will be notified once it is public.
eventEdit.pendingApprovalBannerAdmin: This event was submitted by an organizer and is waiting for your approval before it can go public.
eventEdit.rejectionBannerBody: An administrator returned this event to draft: {{reason}}
eventEdit.fieldEndHint: Optional — must be on or after the start date.
eventEdit.locationSectionHint: Pick state and city from the catalog first. Coordinates fill in automatically when you select a city.

validation.endBeforeStart: End date must be on or after the start date.
validation.cityFromCatalog: Choose a city from the list — free-text cities cannot be saved.

eventEdit.fieldCheckInSectionHint: When athletes can be scanned at the venue. Leave both empty to open at midnight on the first event day and close at the event end time.
eventEdit.fieldCheckInAutoHint: Auto window if left empty: {{opens}} → {{closes}} (event local time)
eventEdit.fieldCheckInCapHint: Check-in will close at the event end time ({{closes}}) even if you set a later close.
eventEdit.fieldCheckInErrorPair: Set both check-in open and close times, or leave both empty.
eventEdit.fieldCheckInErrorOrder: Check-in open must be before check-in close.
eventEdit.fieldCheckInErrorOpensAfterEnd: Check-in open cannot be after the event end time.
eventEdit.fieldCheckInErrorClosesAfterEnd: Check-in close cannot be after the event end time.
eventEdit.fieldRequiresWaiverHint: Athletes must accept all active waivers before checkout. Configure them in the Waiver tab.
eventEdit.fieldShortDescHint: One or two sentences shown at the top of the event overview.
eventEdit.fieldDescHint: Full official rules and event details.
eventEdit.fieldDescPlaceholder: Schedule, categories, kit pickup, rules, refunds…
eventEdit.createSuccessHint: Add categories and submit for approval when you are ready.
eventEdit.categoriesSubtitle: Distance tiers are what athletes choose at checkout. Set distance, price, capacity, and optional age or gender eligibility on each tier.
eventEdit.noCategories: No categories yet. Add at least one before publishing.
eventEdit.categoryCapacityHint: Leave empty for unlimited spots in this tier.
eventEdit.categoryDistanceHint: Primary tier label for runners — e.g. 5, 10, 21, 42.
eventEdit.categoryDescriptionPlaceholder: What's included: medal, chip timing, shirt…
eventEdit.categoryGenderHint: Restrict who can register in this tier. Open = any gender.
eventEdit.categoryAgeHint: Optional age limits — e.g. Master 40+ set min age to 40.
eventEdit.categoryTemplatesHint: Pre-fill name and distance. Adjust price and eligibility before adding.
eventEdit.waitlistSubtitle: Offer spots when capacity opens. Athletes receive an email when offered.
eventEdit.waitlistEmpty: No one on the waitlist yet.
eventEdit.mediaSubtitle: Photos and videos shown on the public event page.
eventEdit.fieldsSubtitle: Collect extra info during checkout (shirt size, emergency contact, etc.)
eventEdit.waiverSubtitle: Athletes must accept all active waivers before completing registration
eventEdit.waiverMultiHint: Add one or more waivers (HTML, PDF, or both). Athletes sign every active waiver at checkout.
eventEdit.waiverEmpty: No waivers yet. Add your first responsiva below.
eventEdit.wavesSubtitle: Group athletes into corral start times
eventEdit.courseSubtitleVisual: Draw the route on the map and place aid stations — athletes see this on the event page
eventEdit.discountsSubtitle: Promotional codes for this event (no payout setup required)

courseEditor.poiHint: Click the map to drop this checkpoint
courseEditor.careerStartHint: Step 1 only — places the green start flag. This does not draw the course line.
courseEditor.flowStepStart: Set race start (green flag) — drag or type coordinates
courseEditor.flowStepDraw: Select Draw route, then click the map to trace the path (min. 2 points)
courseEditor.flowStepGpxStart: Race start taken from the first GPX track point
courseEditor.flowStepGpxRoute: Route imported from GPX — review on the map
courseEditor.flowGpxHint: GPX files include the start and path. You can continue once the route looks correct.
courseEditor.flowManualHint: Or import a GPX above to skip manual start and tracing.
courseEditor.gpxImportHint: Upload a GPX track from Strava, Garmin, or your watch. We set the race start from the first point and draw the full route automatically.
courseEditor.gpxImportSuccess: GPX imported. Start and route are ready — review the map, then continue.
courseEditor.gpxParseFailed: Could not find a track in this GPX. Use a file with at least 2 track points.
courseEditor.gpxReadFailed: Could not read this file. Try exporting GPX again or use a laptop browser.
courseEditor.gpxInvalidType: Choose a .gpx file exported from your GPS app or watch.
courseEditor.gpxTooLarge: This GPX file is too large (max 8MB). Export a shorter track or simplify it in your GPS app.
courseEditor.gpxImportSimplified: GPX imported. Dense tracks are simplified for performance — review the map, then continue.
courseEditor.invalidCoordinates: The route contains invalid coordinates (e.g. 0,0). Re-import your GPX or redraw the course.
courseEditor.invalidStartLocation: Set a valid race start location before continuing.
courseEditor.gpxStartApplied: Start coordinates were set from your GPX file. Adjust only if the start line should move.
courseEditor.flowNeedStart: Step 1: Set the race start first
courseEditor.flowNeedRoute: Step 2: Click the map with Draw route active ({{count}}/2 points)
courseEditor.hintRouteAfterStart: Start is set — click the map to trace the course from the flag
courseEditor.routeSetStartFirst: Set the race start above before tracing
courseEditor.routeClickToTrace: Click the map to draw the course line from the start flag
courseEditor.routeDrawn: Route traced with {{count}} points — use Undo to remove the last point
courseEditor.distanceAfterRoute: Distance appears after you trace at least 2 points
courseEditor.careerStartUnset: No start set — enter coordinates or place on map
courseEditor.hintStart: Click the map to set the race start
courseEditor.noPois: No checkpoints yet — switch to Add point and click the map
courseEditor.guideStep1: Choose Draw route, then click the map to trace the path point by point (or import a GPX file).
courseEditor.guideStep2: Use Undo to remove the last route point, or the trash icon to clear the whole route.
courseEditor.guideStep3: Switch to Add point, pick a type (hydration, medical, etc.), and click the map to place checkpoints.
courseEditor.guideStep4: Use Pan map to drag and zoom — scroll wheel zooms when drawing or placing points.
courseEditor.guideStep5: Review distance and elevation, then click Save course below when you're done.
courseEditor.guideTip: Green flag = race start (editable lat/lng). Drag it on the map to adjust. Preview shows what registrants will see.
courseEditor.wizardSubtitle: Draw the route, place aid stations, and preview what athletes will see.
courseEditor.wizardDesc_route: Set the race start (lat/lng), then click the map to trace the course or import a GPX. You need at least 2 route points to continue.
courseEditor.wizardDesc_routeGpx: Your GPX is loaded — start and route are already set. Review the map, then continue to checkpoints.
courseEditor.wizardDesc_checkpoints: Place hydration, medical, start/finish, and other points along the route.
courseEditor.wizardDesc_review: Confirm distance, elevation, and the athlete-facing map before saving.
courseEditor.summaryEmpty: No course mapped yet. Open the builder to draw the route and add checkpoints.
courseEditor.hintRoute: Draw route: click the map to add path points · Undo removes the last
courseEditor.hintPoi: Click the map to place a checkpoint
courseEditor.hintPan: Drag to pan · Scroll to zoom

checkIn.title: Quick check-in

checkIn.subtitleGlobal: Scan or enter a registration folio or QR token. Bib lookup is available from the event hub check-in tab.
checkIn.forceUnsignedDescription: This athlete has not signed the required waiver. Force check-in only if you have verified their waiver on paper or have staff authorization.
checkIn.forceOutdatedDescription: The waiver was updated after this athlete signed. They should re-sign in the app, or you can force check-in if you have verified acceptance offline.
checkIn.windowInvalidTimezoneHint: Check-in cannot be validated until the event timezone is fixed. Contact support.
checkIn.windowOrganizerLocked: QR validation is only available during this event's check-in window.
checkIn.bypassWindowDescription: This event is outside its check-in window. Only use this for authorized testing or exceptional circumstances. The action is logged.

validation.rfcInvalid: Enter a valid RFC (12 or 13 characters)

payouts.feeCalculatorHint: All amounts include IVA. Athletes pay inscription + service fee.

meta.title: Triboo Sport — Events & Your Triboo
meta.description: Connect. Participate. Push your limits. Discover and register for triathlons, marathons, and races across Mexico and Latin America.
meta.imageAlt: Triboo Sport — sports events and your athlete Triboo

hero.description: Discover the best sports events and rally your Triboo — people who always chase the next challenge.
hero.searchNoResults: No matches — try another word or check your spelling.
hero.mobileSearchPlaceholder: Search events, cities, sports and more
hero.mobileLocationDenied: Location access was denied. Enable it in your browser settings or pick a city manually.

hero.mobileLocationTimeout: Location request timed out. Try again or pick a city manually.
hero.mobileLocationUnsupported: Your browser does not support location services.
hero.mobileLocationNoCity: No nearby cities with events were found. Pick a city manually.
hero.noEvents: New events are loading — explore the full catalog.

checkout.claimHint: Your waitlist spot is reserved — complete checkout before the offer expires.
checkout.fileNotSupported: File uploads are not available during online checkout. Contact the organizer.
checkout.fileRequiredBlocked: This event requires a file upload that cannot be completed here. Please contact the organizer.
checkout.alreadyRegistered: You are already registered for this event.
checkout.genericError: Could not start checkout. Please try again.

errors.profileIncomplete: Complete your profile (date of birth and gender) before registering.
errors.genderIneligible: This category is not open to your gender.
errors.ageIneligible: You do not meet the age requirements for this category.
errors.closed: Registration has closed for this event.
errors.paymentsUnavailable: Online payment is temporarily unavailable for this event. Please try again later or contact the organizer.
errors.paymentSetupFailed: We could not start card payment. Please try again in a few minutes.

waiver.allRequiredHint: You must read and accept every waiver listed below.
waiver.mustAccept: You must accept the waiver to continue
waiver.mustAcceptAll: You must accept all waivers to continue
waiver.acceptAllLabel: I have read and accept all waivers listed above
waiver.signatureMin: Signature must be at least 3 characters
waiver.acceptLabel: I have read and accept the terms of this waiver
waiver.signatureLabel: Type your full name as signature

payment.title: Payment
payment.unavailable: Online card payment is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or contact the organizer.
payment.pending: Payment is still processing. Please wait.
payment.authenticationRequired: Your bank requires additional verification to complete this payment.
payment.authenticationFailed: Card verification failed or was canceled.
payment.tryAgain: Please try again or use a different payment method.

result.successHint: Your registration is confirmed. See you at the start line.
result.failedHint: Your card was not charged. You can try again or use a different method.
result.qrHint: Your QR check-in code is available in your athlete portal.
result.waitlistHint: We'll email you when a spot opens. Your place is reserved in line.

citySelector.noResults: No cities found in the catalog.
citySelector.unresolvedBody: "{{city}}" ({{state}}) is not in our city list. You cannot save a free-text city.
citySelector.selectStateFirst: Select a state first, then choose your city.
citySelector.invalidSelectionTitle: Select a city from the list
citySelector.supportMessageOrganizer: Contact your Triboo Sport administrator to add this city to the catalog.
citySelector.supportMessageAdmin: Contact Triboo Sport platform support to add this city to the catalog.
citySelector.statesLoadError: Could not load states. Check your connection and try again.
citySelector.citiesLoadError: Could not load cities. Check your connection and try again.
